title: Neomouse settings
description: Configuration for neomouse. Mirrors the nested `Config` struct in Sources/neomouseConfig/config.swift.

inset.description: Pixels between the grid bounds and the screen edges.

divisions.description: Outer grid cells per axis. Capped at 26 (alphabet length).

inner_divisions.description: Inner grid cells per axis within a selected outer cell.

find_mode_characters.description: Outer-cell labels. Length must be >= divisions^2.

find_mode_inner_characters.description: Inner-cell labels. Length must be >= inner_divisions^2.

is_always_show_inner_characters.description: Render inner-cell labels alongside outer labels at first keypress.

motion.description: Cursor motion behavior in normal mode.

rows_on_screen.description: Vertical grid resolution. Integer cell count, or 'automatic' to derive from screen height (~20pt per cell). Step size for j/k = usable height / rows.

columns_on_screen.description: Horizontal grid resolution. Integer cell count, or 'automatic' to square cells against the resolved row height. Step size for h/l = usable width / columns.

is_clamp_cursor_to_current_screen.description: If true, hjkl motions stay within the active display.

minimum_highlight_width.description: Floor pixel width below which the highlight is suppressed.

zoom_step_value.description: Zoom delta per `+`/`-` press. Allowed range: 0.01..10.

increments_per_gesture.description: Sub-events emitted per logical gesture for smoother animation.

degrees_to_rotate.description: Degrees rotated per `r`/`R` press. Negative values reverse direction.

commands.description: Ex-style commands exposed in command-line mode.

available.description: Whitelist of commands. Must match the `Command` enum in Sources/neomouseConfig/config.swift.

configuration.description: Process-wide knobs that don't belong with motion/visual/etc.

is_disable_key_input.description: If true, the CGEventTap runs in .defaultTap mode and swallows most plain keypresses while neomouse is active. If false, listen-only — every key passes through.

max_session_count.description: Cap on the number of session rows retained in the DB.

new_session_on_open.description: Open a fresh session on launch instead of resuming the most recent one.

mode_on_start.description: Which mode neomouse boots into. 'disabled' leaves it dormant until Cmd-E activates.
